infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 03 - 05 July 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 17:00, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Scuderia Ferrari HP Document 73 Date 05 July 2026 Time 16:47 No / Driver 44 - Lewis Ham

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX
03 - 05 July 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 17:00, in relation to the
incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Scuderia Ferrari HP
Document 73
Date 05 July 2026
Time 16:47
No / Driver 44 - Lewis Hamilton
Reason Alleged breach of Article B1.8.4 of the FIA F1 Regulations
Gerd Ennser Tanja Geilhausen
Mathieu Remmerie Pedro Lamy
Richard Norbury
